main:mission:
Our mission:
Fully harness the immense potential of generative artificial intelligence methods, seize historical opportunities, and produce pioneering foundational methods and groundbreaking application demonstrations across different vertical symbol systems and their corresponding downstream applications.
main:vision:
Our vision:
Develop entirely new generative artificial intelligence methods to enable rapid and precise symbol generation across various complex symbol systems.
main:news:Jun2024: * Jun. 2024: We're Hiring! Looking for posdoc fellowship (2 hc) and research asistant (2 hc) to join us. Also welcome students to intern in our lab. Please feel free to contact us if you are interested.
